{{Quote|I have nothing else I can give you. I can't pay you, I can't promote you, I can't give you a few days' R and R, and I can't even decorate you for valor. I'm truly sorry that I can't. And I'm sorry that you're being used like this and I wish I could put an end to it and change your lives for the better. But I can't. All I can do is ask your forgiveness.|Etain Tur-Mukan, speaking to Nye following the Skirmish at Dinso|<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero" />}}
'''Nye''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who fought in the [[Skirmish at Dinlo|Skirmish at]] [[Dinlo]].<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero" />

During the fight, he sustained minor injuries including a shrapnel wound to the head. While waiting his turn in the triage line, he was approached by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], who gave Nye a heartfelt apology over the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] indifference to the welfare of the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] troopers. She also gave him a water bottle for his efforts.<ref name="Republic Commando: Triple Zero" />
